articles.title: 'Travelled without paying correct fare': SMRT takes action after rat sighting on EWL train
articles.content: "It appears to have entered Lakeside station after emerging from nearby bushes and running through the fare gates.". SMRT went on to declare that "Master Splinter" had travelled without paying the correct fare. @asiaone Because Master Splinter belongs in the subway. #sgnews #Singapore #MRT #Trains #Rats ♬ original sound - AsiaOne
articles.summary:
